phrases.intent_en: When is the next train to Jungfraujoch
phrases.text_local: When does the next train to Jungfraujoch leave?
phrases.cultural_note: Deutsche Bahn and BLS trains depart at fixed intervals. Platforms may change last-minute.

phrases.intent_en: How do I validate Jungfrau Travel Pass
phrases.text_local: How do I activate the Jungfrau Travel Pass?
phrases.cultural_note: Validation is required before first use. Conductors check passes during travel.

likely_response.translation_en: At the counter or on the train.

responses.english: At the counter or on the train.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the SBB travel center
phrases.text_local: Where is the SBB travel center?
phrases.cultural_note: SBB travel centers are typically near main entrances or ticket counters in Swiss stations.

likely_response.local: Auf der anderen Seite im Hauptgebäude.
likely_response.translation_en: On the other side in the main building.

responses.english: On the other side in the main building.
responses.french: Auf der anderen Seite im Hauptgebäude.

phrases.cultural_note: Platforms are signposted in German, French, and English. Signs use 'Plattform' or 'Gleis'.

likely_response.local: Gleis 2B ist auf der anderen Seite.
likely_response.translation_en: Platform 2B is on the other side.

responses.english: Platform 2B is on the other side.
responses.french: Gleis 2B ist auf der anderen Seite.

phrases.intent_en: Is wheelchair ramp available to all platforms
phrases.text_local: Is there a wheelchair ramp on all platforms?
phrases.cultural_note: Swiss stations are legally required to provide accessibility. Ramps are standard at larger stations.
